scripts.build: pnpm --filter @quantago/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @quantago/frontend build && pnpm --filter @quantago/admin build && pnpm --filter @quantago/landing typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @quantago/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @quantago/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @quantago/admin typecheck && pnpm --filter @quantago/landing typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @quantago/api lint && pnpm --filter @quantago/frontend lint && pnpm --filter @quantago/admin lint && pnpm --filter @quantago/landing lint
scripts.deploy:all: bash scripts/deploy-backend.sh && bash scripts/deploy-frontend.sh && bash scripts/deploy-admin.sh && bash scripts/deploy-landing.sh
